[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001000 2
1 100000011 3
2 011101110 6
3 001101111 6
4 000000000 a
5 111111111 a
6 010101111 6
7 100100111 5
